calendar.1: Record inherited IRA balances. Calculate annual distribution floors.
calendar.3: Verify inherited IRA distribution schedules and deployment plans.
calendar.6: YTD distribution check — should be at least 50% of annual floor.
calendar.9: YTD distribution check — should be at least 80% of annual floor.
calendar.10: Review tax bracket headroom and any year-end true-up distributions.
calendar.12: Finalize distributions, confirm withholding, and update the policy file.
